top_risks.reasons: [LLM] Matches configured high-risk pathogen list with adequate support (52 reads, >=10) and stable (not sharply increasing), so High rather than Critical. Recommend confirmatory RT-qPCR/amplicon sequencing.
[LLM] Norovirus matches high-risk pathogen list with adequate support (26 reads) and stable trend, so High not Critical. Recommend orthogonal confirmation before action.
[LLM] Non-phage, non-high-risk-list virus with substantial support (116 reads). Enteric adenovirus is commonly shed faecally; Medium given solid signal but not on configured high-risk list.
[LLM] Non-phage virus not on the high-risk list, with substantial support (26 reads). Medium given a solid but non-prioritised signal.
[LLM] Common seasonal human coronavirus, not on high-risk list; 20 reads provide substantial support → Medium.
